reason: This is a high-quality sample with strong performance across all three evaluation layers. The assistant correctly uses all four required tools (memory_health, memory_search, memory_get, memory_stats) in the proper sequence and stays fully grounded in the tool outputs, presenting results in clear, well-formatted tables. The user exhibits natural behavior with realistic follow-up requests and never mentions tool names or API jargon, aligning well with the self-help author persona. The planner created a coherent task with four logically ordered goals that the trajectory successfully completes. The validation warnings about tool names appear to be false positives from namespace prefixes rather than actual mismatches.
